_comment: Manual per-feed overrides applied during GTFS import (and via import/apply-overrides.ts for already-imported feeds). Display overrides (route_color/route_text_color/route_long_name/route_short_name, stop_name) patch the DB after import and are display-only — they do NOT change the GTFS ZIP, so MOTIS routing is unaffected. Feeds are keyed by gtfs feed_id OR onestop_id. route_type overrides (which must also reach MOTIS/pfaedle) are handled separately by rewriting the ZIP, not here.
